Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant GONZALO MARTINEZ'S Motion To Preclude Introduction Of Evidence is DENIED. Plaintiff CACH, LLC has complied in good faith with Defendant's demand for a Bill of Particulars. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
